name: overleaf-paper
description: Author academic papers locally while synchronizing Overleaf projects through Git, with Journal of Systems and Software writing guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Write papers locally and sync Overleaf projects through Git.
interface.longDescription: Adds an academic paper workflow for Overleaf Git projects, including offline Overleaf Git instructions and Journal of Systems and Software writing and formatting checks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Overleaf Paper to pull my Overleaf manuscript, revise it for Journal of Systems and Software requirements, validate it, and prepare a safe push summary.
